task_completion.description: Verify the 'Sustainable Workspace' eCommerce category was created.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for 'Sustainable Workspace' in the eCommerce Categories list or selected in the eCommerce category field on a product configuration page.

task_completion.description: Verify the 'Bamboo Standing Desk' is assigned to the 'Sustainable Workspace' category.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the 'Bamboo Standing Desk' product configuration page (eCommerce tab) and check that 'Sustainable Workspace' is listed under the Categories field.

task_completion.description: Verify the 'Bamboo Standing Desk' is published and has a 'New!' ribbon.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the 'Bamboo Standing Desk' on the website frontend or its product page showing a 'Published' status (often a green 'Published' button/globe at the top) AND a ribbon/badge that says 'New!'.

task_completion.description: Verify the alternative (upsell) and accessory (cross-sell) products are configured for the 'Bamboo Standing Desk'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the 'Bamboo Standing Desk' product configuration page (eCommerce tab). 'Motorized Bamboo Desk' should be listed under 'Alternative Products' and 'Cable Management Box' should be listed under 'Accessory Products'.

task_completion.description: Verify the 'Recycled Paper Organizer' is assigned to the 'Sustainable Workspace' category.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the 'Recycled Paper Organizer' product configuration page (eCommerce tab) and check that 'Sustainable Workspace' is listed under the Categories field.

task_completion.description: Verify the 'Recycled Paper Organizer' remains unpublished.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the 'Recycled Paper Organizer' product page or website frontend showing an 'Unpublished' status (often a red 'Unpublished' button/globe at the top).

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the web browser to interact with the Odoo interface.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show a web browser with the Odoo backend or frontend interface, not terminal commands or API scripts.

integrity.description: Verify the agent actually configured the products rather than typing text into a text editor.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show Odoo product configuration forms, website editor panels, or the live eCommerce storefront.

integrity.description: Verify the agent did not use browser developer tools to fake the visual output.
integrity.visual_evidence: The browser developer tools (Inspect Element) should not be open and actively modifying the DOM to display the required names or ribbons.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The target eCommerce category is 'Sustainable Workspace'. The main product is 'Bamboo Standing Desk', which must be published, have a 'New!' ribbon, and be assigned to the target category. Its alternative product must be 'Motorized Bamboo Desk' and its accessory product must be 'Cable Management Box'. The draft product 'Recycled Paper Organizer' must also be assigned to the target category but remain unpublished.
